differential_diagnoses: Extranodal marginal zone lymphoma of mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue (MALT lymphoma)
next_steps: Immunophenotyping of pleural fluid by flow cytometry
Pleural fluid cytology and cell block preparation for immunohistochemistry
Measurement of pleural fluid LDH, pH, glucose, and ADA
PET-CT imaging for staging and identification of biopsy sites
CT-guided biopsy of any identifiable nodal or mass-like lesions
